theme_archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Light Theme - Oceanic Wave Style)

brand.name: Wave
brand.description: A premium, AI-native WhatsApp clone featuring a calming ocean-inspired aesthetic, thumb-centric gestures, and a built-in AI assistant.

onboarding_screens.layout: Minimalist bento-style forms with generous top spacing. Large 'Wave' branding in deep navy.
onboarding_screens.inputs: Solid #F0F4F8 backgrounds, no borders, soft inner padding (p-4). Large text for phone numbers to improve touch accuracy.

chat_list.item_layout: Row flex, large avatar (56x56), name and last message stacked. Right aligned timestamp and unread badge.
chat_list.unread_badge: Ocean Teal (#0A7A90) pill with white text.
chat_list.ai_pinned: AI Assistant chat pinned at top, using subtle cyan glow or border to differentiate.

chat_screen.background: Use the provided subtle wave texture as ImageBackground with low opacity.

bubbles.received: bg-white rounded-2xl rounded-bl-sm p-4 shadow-sm border border-slate-100

chat_screen.input_bar: Solid white bottom bar floating above keyboard with padding. Multi-line input, send, attach, and voice note icons.

motion_and_interactions.button_press: Scale to 0.95 and slight opacity decrease on press.
motion_and_interactions.screen_transition: Standard slide-from-right for chat screens, bottom-sheet slide-up for settings.

accessibility_and_testing.test_id_rule: Every interactive element MUST include a testID attribute (React Native equivalent to data-testid). Use kebab-case e.g., testID='login-submit-button'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure primary text meets 4.5:1 contrast against #F0F4F8 background.

chat_background.description: Subtle wave texture background for chat screen

ai_avatar.description: 3D AI Assistant Avatar for the Wave Bot
